title: Two BR - in a great area.
body: Price from: 850. Welcome to the Van Mark Apartments in Monroe, Louisiana. Monroe sits across the Ouachita River from its sister city of West Monroe, Louisiana. The 2 cities are known as the Twin Cities. Van Mark Apartments is off of Old Sterling and Finks Hideaway with easy access to a variety of shopping, dining, entertainment and recreational activities. It is a beautiful area to live, with the Bayou DeSiard flowing through parts of the area. Van Mark offers residents a beautiful tohome. With two amazing one and two beds floor plans to choose from you will find the apartment home that is right for you. Each home features a balcony or patio with added storage area, ac, walk-in closets, and a wonderful kitchen for all of your gourmet cooking needs. Van Mark Apartments offers residents a lifestyle of comfort and convenience. luxurious doesn t end when you leave your apartment home! Van Mark Apartments in Monroe, LA, features community amenities suited for your active lifestyle.
